summary: Dominion OS is public-demo ready, canonical /demo-1 bridge ready for controlled prospect sharing, and Cloud Run health/status green. Full commercial launch remains blocked until direct MP4 evidence or corrected MP4 language, commerce/customer-portal proof, production observability, autonomous remediation, rollback, and client-safe payment/provisioning receipts exist.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run /demo is live and reachable as the public runtime surface.
Live /demo currently displays MP4-complete language, including actual demo MP4 integrated wording.
Canonical demo-manifest.json still has assets.videoMp4 set to null and fullCommercialGreenAllowed set to false.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Either publish and verify a real public MP4 asset with manifest metadata, or soften runtime copy so it no longer implies direct MP4 availability.

currentEvidence: Live https://www.fractal5solutions.com/demo-1 is reachable through the Fractal5 site and is linked from /launch as the public demo bridge.
Live page visibly exposes the public demo, proof/recording path, health JSON, status JSON, manifest, sample data, receipts, and controlled-access path.

squarespace/demo-1-final.html contains the hardened bridge source package with data-version 2026-06-08-hardened, noreferrer/referrer hardening, hidden poster fallback, and manifest URL allowlist logic.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Capture a deployed live-DOM receipt proving the live Squarespace page contains every exact hardened source feature and required CTA label, not only visible equivalent routes.

currentEvidence: demo/assets/demo-manifest.json is public and source-served.
demo/assets/sample-data.json is public and asserts no production data, customer data, secrets, or payment data.
demo/assets/demo-download-package.json is public and states it is not a private source-code bundle and contains no keys, customer data, payment data, or private runtime artifacts.
demo/assets/release-receipts.json is public and preserves claim-control boundaries.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Keep source-served assets public, public-safe, and continuously watched; do not add binary or private assets without separate receipts.

currentEvidence: Public demo assets assert no secrets, no customer data, no payment data, and no private services exposed.
Cloud Run status advertises hardening headers and non-root/no-inline/third-party browser controls.
The bridge and launch pages maintain public/private boundary language.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Secret scanning, dependency scanning, tenant-isolation proof, public-boundary review, and release-security receipts exist for the public and production paths.

currentEvidence: PR #127 is merged and added public watchlist and post-publish verification scaffolding.
PR #128 is merged and hardened the demo-1 source bridge package.
PR #142 is merged and added commercial readiness gates.
No current complete commercial-production CI/e2e/pass receipt has been proven in this packet.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Current CI, link checks, asset checks, public-boundary checks, e2e bridge checks, and runtime claim-drift checks pass on the release candidate.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run /health returns status ok with environment demo-sandbox, provider gcloud, runtime cloud-run, region us-central1, service demo, version 2.0.0, and revision demo-00005-6dp.
Cloud Run /status returns hardening metadata, route metadata, generated timestamp, uptime, and status fields.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Continue hourly route probes and preserve public health/status receipts without exposing secrets.

currentEvidence: No public proof of checkout, customer portal, subscription, billing, tenant provisioning, entitlement lifecycle, payment/procurement, support, refund, or privacy receipts was found in demo-build or the public proof surface.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Live checkout or deliberately invoice-only sales motion is documented with payment/procurement, onboarding, entitlement, support, refund, and privacy receipts.

currentEvidence: Health and status endpoints exist and are public.
No durable public proof of uptime checks, alert routing, SLOs, incident receipts, traces, metrics retention, or rollback evidence is present in demo-build.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Uptime, alerting, log-sampling, SLO, incident-response, and rollback receipts are generated and stored without exposing secrets.

currentEvidence: Delivery contract names Fractal5-Solutions/phi-ops as the operational daemon/evidence layer.
phi-ops public-facing README claims product certification and local automation posture, but this does not by itself prove production autonomous remediation or native GCP self-healing.
Native GCP self-healing remains explicitly unclaimed without separate proof.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Watcher ingestion, autonomous remediation, rollback/recovery, native or equivalent self-healing, and auditable receipts exist and are current.

allowedNow: Dominion OS has a live public Google Cloud demo surface with public demo, health, and status routes.
Dominion OS has a canonical Fractal5 /demo-1 public website bridge for controlled prospect sharing.
Dominion OS has source-served public demo assets, sample data, release receipts, and watchlist verification scaffolding.
notAllowedWithoutSeparateReceipts: direct MP4 is available unless a real public MP4 URL is published and verified

requiredReceiptsForFullCommercialGreen: deployed /demo-1 live-DOM verification receipt for exact hardened bridge features
claim-drift repair receipt for /demo MP4 language versus manifest
hourly probe output for /demo-1, Cloud Run routes, and raw assets
autonomous remediation/self-healing receipt if that claim is made
